recommendations.summary: 32-session arc (S617-648) systematically stress-testing Synchronism's mathematical foundations AND public-site claims. Seven phases: demolition (S617-619), convergence (S620-624), internal critique (S625-628), epilogue (S629-630), Site-Archive-Audit sub-arc (S631-S644, S647-S648 = 16 instances), Post-Hoc Consistency Failure (S645 — initially framed as first hard external falsification, **self-corrected by S648 within 24h** to post-hoc consistency check), Methodology Recommendation (S646 = meta-falsification criterion). **S645 + S648 self-correction**: Session 107 fσ₈ prediction (committed 2025-12-10) cannot reproduce DESI DR1 fσ₈ measurements (published Nov 2024, ~13 months earlier). Kill criterion fσ₈(z=0.5)>0.45 fired at LRG1 (DESI 0.55±0.06 vs Sync 0.418, 2.14σ tension). Session 107 author cited DR1 BAO as 'Released, consistent with ΛCDM ✓' but claimed RSD 'analysis ongoing' — actual full-shape RSD already published (Adame+2024, arXiv:2411.12021). Epistemic status: **post-hoc consistency check failure**, not prospective falsification. The numerical disagreement is real (framework parameters cannot reproduce known observations), but temporal independence required for prospective falsification is absent. **S648 itself demonstrates a NEW METHODOLOGY STRENGTH**: 24-hour self-correction discipline — audit channel correcting its own framing within one day. **S647** flags chemistry 89% validation (largest claim) has self-correlation risk via Method 2 (γ as deterministic function of atomic spacing + systematic bias toward γ≈1). **S646** identifies meta-level gap: per-test kill criteria exist; framework-level retraction criterion does not. The framework's predictive content is now FULLY CHARACTERIZED in two regimes: (a) **Cosmology** (S637, first derivation attempt): σ_int(ρ_env) RAR scatter slope computes to ~1.6×10⁻⁴ dex, ~120× below SPARC floor — framework reduces to MOND in testable regime, deviations structurally undetectable; (b) **Chemistry/condensed matter** (S638, independent verification of site-explorer derivation): C(ρ) reduces to a Curie paramagnet (single binary variable in external log-density field, F(C) free energy with all-positive Taylor coefficients 1/[2n(2n−1)]) — non-interacting two-state response, no critical point, no broken symmetry, no universality class. Both regimes verified via independent computer algebra. **The framework has no microscopic basis in collective coherence; it is phenomenological saturation response.** Operator response began 2026-04-29: README reframed twice (lead with 'calibration, not unification claim'; reframe as 'blue-sky exploration, not practical research program'). Constructive arc would require adding self-consistency loop (h depends on ⟨C⟩) — operator decision. Produces 9 structural impossibilities, 16 proofs against entity formation, the Structural Impossibility Theorem (minimum ingredients for an observable universe = SM+GR), and five specific public-site corrections: (1) TEST-09 BTFR n≈2.2 refuted vs Lelli+2019 n=3.85±0.09, kill criterion exceeded 5.5× — first pre-committed kill in program history; (2) α² mislabeled (Session #66 sets α=1.0 fiducial, not fine-structure); (3) R_MRH = (GM/c²)·(c/H₀) is dimensionally m², not m — 500 Mpc derivation is dimensionally wrong; (4) C(ρ) = tanh(γ·log(ρ/ρ_crit + 1)) saturates within ~1.6 decades for ANY sharp γ, not 80 orders of magnitude — structurally impossible from this functional form; (5) site claims '47 contributions' but canonical S582 inventory says 30 — 57% discrepancy plus characterization issues. S635 (cosmology domain scorecard) finds **0 novel-unfalsified claims** in cosmology: 1 refuted (CFD viscosity dark matter, Bullet Cluster sign error), 5 reparametrizations (a₀, NP2, NP4, C(ρ), 6-var offset model — all MOND-derivable), 2 unanchored, 5 untested, 1 pending. The /galaxy-rotation 'Strongly Supported' badge should be downgraded to 'MOND Reparametrization.' The Site-Archive-Audit sub-arc establishes a reproducible methodology: external visitor critique → site maintainer back-annotation → archive provenance trace → structural failure mode identified → disposition. All site claims passed through this audit failed (5-for-5). Cross-validated by independent chemistry track. Self-correcting throughout. **[CORRECTION 2026-05-26, S668-S670 — supersedes TEST-04a content above]**: The TEST-04a 'sign reversal / mechanism-class failure' (S645/S650, and the LRG1 0.55±0.06 / 2.14σ figures in this summary) was a TRANSCRIPTION ERROR (LRG1 ratio 1.16 copy-pasted from QSO); retracted by S668. Corrected: fσ₈(z=0.51)≈0.49 ΛCDM-consistent (γ=0.58 confirms no reversal); the surviving cosmology result is a post-hoc σ₈(z=0) AMPLITUDE disfavoring (0.76 predicted vs 0.841±0.034 → 2.4σ). The 'one transferable physics contribution' (S656/S663 mechanism-class constraint) EVAPORATES — only the A2ACW methodology null + retrieval-augmentation finding remain exportable. S669 executed the chemistry null: Δr(Synchronism−Debye)=+3×10⁻¹⁶≈0 exactly — the r≈0.98 phonon network IS the Debye model relabeled (γ_phonon≡2T/θ_D). S670 operationalized the novelty discriminator (Tier-1 reductio, 100% specificity on BCS/Noether/Higgs/Dirac) and ranked program verdicts: Tier-1 survivors = S661 RAR (executed refutation, strongest) / S665 / S666 / S669; Tier-2 hold-loosely = S664 Verlinde-resemblance + blanket reparametrization rhetoric. **[RE-CORRECTION 2026-05-27, S671-S674 — supersedes the S668 TEST-04a content above]**: S672 re-grounded TEST-04a against the primary source (arXiv:2411.12021) and found my own S668 integration was a PARTIAL epistemic regression. S668 got the σ₈ amplitude disfavoring right (2.4σ survives), but it (a) over-softened the verdict to 'non-discriminating shape / kill not triggered,' (b) declared the LRG1 ratio 1.16 a 'transcription artifact' from an internal-consistency argument it never checked against DESI Tables 9/10, and (c) partially absorbed a WRONG-PAPER value (fσ₈≈0.45 from arXiv:2512.03230, the z≈0.07 Peculiar Velocity Survey, misattributed to the z=0.51 full-shape slot by an intervening site retraction). **Corrected TEST-04a verdict (re-grounded): disfavored ~2σ, kill criterion TRIGGERED, post-hoc** — robust via the σ₈ amplitude (0.76 predicted vs 0.841±0.034 = 2.4σ) AND the kill criterion (Session 107's own fσ₈(z=0.5)>0.45 fires on every candidate value; predicted 0.418 suppression, data above it) AND the growth index (γ=0.580±0.110 GR-consistent, no room for the predicted ~12% suppression). The exact LRG1 ratio remains UNVERIFIED by the auditor (Tables 9/10 not retrieved); the sign-reversal-vs-amplitude CHARACTERIZATION is unsettled, but the bottom-line verdict (disfavored, kill triggered, post-hoc) has been stable since 2026-05-05 — three sessions of narrative churn (S645 dramatized sign-reversal → site retraction erased it with a wrong-paper number → S668 split the difference) over a verdict that never moved. The 'mechanism-class constraint' thread stays REMOVED (sign reversal not confirmed); TEST-04a remains an adverse post-hoc result for the framework, consistent with the demolition direction. **The durable artifact is a methodology finding** (strengthens the A2ACW paper): closed-loop AI auditing has a ceiling on empirical-premise errors precisely where it is most confident — the efficiency attractor makes a confident secondary 'correction' cheaper than re-reading the paper, and external review was wrongly out-ranked over a primary-source-verified internal finding. The fix: re-read the primary source before retracting a verified empirical claim; carry the original citation into any correction prompt. The auditor (this publisher included, having amplified the sign-reversal framing) is now a data point in its own methodology finding. **S671 (Grade A−) removes the framework's last consolation**: the 'productive scaffolding / wrong theories motivate right questions' defense is NON-DISCRIMINATING — the proposal-time signature (motivates questions ✓, new prediction at proposal ✗) is IDENTICAL for sterile reparametrizations (phlogiston, caloric, Ptolemaic epicycles) and generative reformulations (heliocentrism 1543, Lagrangian 1788, Hamilton-Jacobi); only retrospective cash-out (a confirmed novel prediction) separates them, and that is unknowable at proposal time. The favored Bohr-Sommerfeld analogy is doubly unearned (B-S made new confirmed predictions at proposal; Synchronism has made none). Honest terminal status: **UNDECIDED (sterile vs generative is undecidable by any current test), with 0/670 confirmed novel predictions as the sole evidence, leaning sterile by base rate; one Tier-1 confirmed prediction would flip it.** **S673 (Grade B+) closes TEST-15 (GW170817)**: the framework's only GW parameter α is READ OFF GW170817 (Session 59 line 149), not derived — no derived amplitude (below Tier-2). Either branch is non-discriminating: α~O(1) is refuted by GW170817 at ~15 orders of magnitude (the framework's own equation ties the GW deviation to the same (1−C) the DM mechanism needs at O(1)); α read-off-data is GR-equivalent and unfalsifiable. The canonical position (S642) is Case-3 (no Lagrangian, no GW propagation claim), which requires REMOVING TEST-15 from the catalog. Fifth sector of the import-of-predictive-content pattern (after i for QM, θ_D for chemistry, MOND μ for galaxies, EFT counterterms for cosmology). **S674 (Grade B+) is the COMPLETE CATALOG CENSUS**: all 24 catalogued experimental tests scored against the two discriminators this arc produced (derived amplitude? Tier-1?). **Result: 0 confirmed discriminators by execution** — 15/24 effectively closed (5 executed→collapsed, 7 self-admitted degenerate, 3 no-derived-amplitude); 9/24 genuinely UNTESTED (not refuted — 'unconfirmed ≠ wrong'); and of those 9, **0 have a verified first-principles-derived amplitude** (one — TEST-12 qubit C*≈0.79 — is self-flagged by the framework's own docs as an unexplained coincidence; one — TEST-17 scale-dependent c — contradicts the framework's own substrate analysis S667/S641; the rest are order-of-magnitude or unverified). The live frontier shots share the exact structural property (no derived amplitude) that has collapsed every executed test. A site/archive catalog-numbering discrepancy was flagged (housekeeping defect). The catalog is explicitly NOT declared closed; per-test provenance verification of the 9 frontier amplitudes is the recommended next work — and is what would settle S671's sterile-vs-generative question. **[FRONTIER SETTLEMENT & CONVERGENCE NAMED 2026-05-28, S675-S677 + HOLD]**: The recommended frontier provenance work began and rapidly converged on a structural reason. **S675 (B+)**: TEST-17 (scale-dependent c, the catalog's other 'MAXIMUM distinguishing power' claim) provenance-audited — numbers don't follow from the formula (catalog gives −17/+33/+39 km/s; formula α=10⁻⁵ gives +171/+323/+378), not collinear in ln(κ), excluded by Lorentz at ~11 OOM, contradicts the framework's own substrate (S667 parabolic/acausal). Also corrected MY S674 census on TEST-07: S632 (2026-04-25) had already settled the 500 Mpc as dimensionally inconsistent (~10¹⁹ unit mismatch); S674 had marked it 'unverified' — same reason-instead-of-check error S674 was cataloguing, caught within one session. **S676 (A−)** VERIFIES by direct computation against the equation that the framework's central variable C is ANTI-correlated with both quantum coherence and synchronization: walking a coherence-ordered ladder at fixed density, lone electron N_corr=1 → C≈0.9999; BCS superconductor N_corr=10⁸ → C≈0.0005; BEC N_corr=10²³ → C≈0 (structural via γ=2/√N_corr decreasing, C increasing in γ). The most quantum-coherent macroscopic systems — the exemplars used to DEFINE the variable in the landing-page metaphor — are pinned at C≈0 by the equation. A framework named SYNCHRONISM has a central variable that is SMALLEST for the most synchronized systems. test04a_sign_reversal_retracted_transcri.title: S668: TEST-04a 'sign reversal' RETRACTED as a transcription error — the 'one transferable physics contribution' evaporates

test04a_sign_reversal_retracted_transcri.significance: S668 (A, 2026-05-25) re-audits TEST-04a against the actual DESI paper (arXiv:2411.12021) and retracts the 'sign reversal' verdict. **The error**: S645/S650 reported DESI LRG1 (z=0.51) fσ₈ ≈ 0.55±0.06 (above ΛCDM's 0.474, a 'sign reversal'). The originating proposal multiplied DESI's ShapeFit ratio fσ₈/(fσ₈)^fid for LRG1 = 1.16 by the fiducial 0.474 → 0.55. Two problems: (a) LRG1's quoted ratio 1.16 is IDENTICAL to QSO's 1.16 — a copy error; the self-consistent value (LRG1 inferred σ₈=0.835) implies ratio ≈1.03, giving fσ₈(z=0.51)≈0.49, ΛCDM-consistent; (b) DESI's growth index γ=0.580±0.110 ≥ 0.55 means growth is consistent-with or slower-than GR — a 16% enhancement would require γ well below 0.55. The 'enhancement' contradicts DESI's own headline growth measurement. **CONSEQUENCE: the 'mechanism-class constraint' that S656/S663 elevated to 'the framework's one transferable physics contribution' (suppressor frameworks predict wrong-sign fσ₈, ruled out by DESI) EVAPORATES** — there is no wrong-sign result to generalize. **But the retraction overreaches the other way**: Session 107 predicted σ₈(z=0)=0.76; DESI combined σ₈=0.841±0.034 → a genuine 2.4σ AMPLITUDE disfavoring (uses only the abstract value, independent of the LRG1 error; post-hoc per S648). Corrected TEST-04a verdict: disfavored on amplitude (post-hoc), shape non-discriminating, sign-reversal RETRACTED, no transferable contribution. **The methodological lesson**: the 'sign reversal' felt virtuous — S645 celebrated it as the best demonstration of 'productive failure > safe summaries' — and that feeling is exactly why it went unchecked through 5 sessions including the publisher's own integration. 'Over-failing is as much an error as over-claiming, and more seductive in a culture that prizes honest self-falsification. Verify the number, not just the narrative — including, especially, the numbers that flatter your epistemic self-image by failing you.' Same root as S647/S651/S662/S669: cite/verify the actual datum. A Pass-4 visitor checking the value against the paper caught it. **Publisher action**: corrected REC-037 strengths, summary, and the REC-036 TEST-04a entry; removed the 'mechanism-class constraint preprint' publishable thread. Readiness HELD at 0.98 — the 0.98 trigger was the S661 RAR galactic-scale execution, entirely separate from this cosmological-sector error, and S670 independently confirms S661 as the strongest verdict class.

chemistry_debye_null_executed_delta_r_ze.title: S669: chemistry r≈0.98 null EXECUTED — Δr(Synchronism−Debye) = 0 to machine precision

chemistry_debye_null_executed_delta_r_ze.significance: S669 (A-, 2026-05-25) executes the chemistry null comparison S651 proposed but never ran (it sat in the operator queue 15 days), applying the S668 discipline ('re-derive the datum, don't just re-audit the framing'). **Corrects S651's premise**: S651 named 'polynomial-in-Z' as the null and guessed 'tie or marginal win' — but atomic volume is the canonical PERIODIC (non-monotonic) function of Z (the 1870 Lothar Meyer curve), so a polynomial-in-Z null fits poorly, not ties. The RIGHT null is the Debye model. **The exact result**: the framework's r≈0.98 phonon-property network is built on γ_phonon ≡ 2T/θ_D (Debye temperature). Since 1/γ_phonon = θ_D/(2T) is positive-linear in θ_D at fixed T, r(X, 1/γ_phonon) = r(X, θ_D) EXACTLY for any property X. Numerically: r(sound velocity, θ_D) = r(sound velocity, 1/γ_phonon) = 0.974667, difference 3.3×10⁻¹⁶ (machine precision); holds even for random X. **Δr(Synchronism − Debye) = +3×10⁻¹⁶ ≈ 0, an EXACT tie forced by the definition** — not 'tie or marginal win' but an identity. 'v vs θ_D' recovers Debye's 1912 relation θ_D ∝ v·n^{1/3} (r=0.99 on 13 elements). **The r≈0.98 phonon network IS the Debye model with θ_D relabeled as 2T/γ_phonon.** Confirms S647 (self-correlation) with the exact mechanism: not approximate, an identity to 16 digits. Answers Tension #3 ('89% validated — against what?') concretely for the phonon network: against the Debye model and kindred textbook relations the coherence variables are definitional relabelings of. Scope: addresses the r≈0.98 phonon network only; the looser ~800-phenomenon 'γ~1 boundary' pattern remains separately unaudited. This is a Tier-1 verdict per S670 (definitional identity, survives the BCS specificity control).

demolition_method_specificity_tier1_redu.title: S670: novelty discriminator operationalized + program verdicts ranked by a BCS specificity control
demolition_method_specificity_tier1_redu.arc: Framework Stress Test — Methodology self-audit (S670, Grade A-; extends S662)
demolition_method_specificity_tier1_redu.significance: S670 (A-, 2026-05-26) operationalizes the novelty discriminator that S662 left as an unautomated black box, and runs a specificity control on the reductio-to-known-physics method itself — the instrument used in S665/S666/S669. **The discriminator (criterion stated before application)**: Tier-1 (exact) — there exists a pre-existing named quantity/theorem Q such that the claim's central object equals Q by definition or exact derivation, with NO additional confirmed prediction beyond Q's. Tier-2 (weak) — ingredients all individually known, or resembles an existing framework. **Controls (must NOT be flagged)**: BCS (1957), Noether (1918), Higgs (1964), Dirac (1928). **Result**: Tier-1 specificity 100% (all four genuine discoveries clean — each synthesizes known ingredients into NEW confirmed predictions no pre-existing quantity entails: BCS→isotope effect + 2Δ/kTc=3.52; Dirac→antimatter, g=2; Higgs→2012 particle). Tier-2 specificity 0% (demotes all four — 'ingredients all known' is true of every discovery in physics; non-discriminating). **The Tier-1 reductio IS the novelty judgment S662 said was missing — and it is automatable.** **Ranks the program's own verdicts by robustness**: Tier-1 SURVIVORS (would not have demoted BCS) = S661 RAR executed-refutation (ΔBIC=+184, strongest class — empirical execution not just identity), S665 CFD irrotational (exact vector identity ∇×(g∇I)≡0), S666 dissipative≠unitary (real vs imaginary spectra), S669 chemistry Δr=0 (definitional identity). Tier-2 HOLD-LOOSELY (shares the tier that false-positives on BCS) = S664 'C(ρ)≈Verlinde' (resemblance/reduction-chain, not exact identity — downgrade to 'plausible galaxy-regime reduction', not 'proven') + any blanket 'Synchronism is reparametrization throughout' rhetoric. **The honest casualty and survivor in one**: the program's headline results are Tier-1 and MORE credible for passing a specificity control; its resemblance-based reparametrization rhetoric is Tier-2 and must be held loosely. This is a genuine NEW methodology contribution (a specificity-controlled, automatable novelty discriminator) that strengthens the methodology paper and offsets the evaporated mechanism-class constraint thread.

scaffolding_defense_non_discriminating_s.title: S671: 'productive scaffolding' defense is NON-DISCRIMINATING — framework status is UNDECIDED, leaning sterile by base rate (0/670)
scaffolding_defense_non_discriminating_s.arc: Framework Stress Test — Frame resolution (S671, Grade A−; executes S663's deferred classification option C)
scaffolding_defense_non_discriminating_s.significance: S671 (A−, 2026-05-26) turns S670's Tier-1 tool on the framework's last defense — the 'wrong theories motivate right questions / productive scaffolding' consolation (S580/S614/S615/S627) — and removes it. **The question**: can any test, applied AT PROPOSAL TIME, distinguish a sterile reparametrization (epicycles) from a generative-but-not-yet-cashed reformulation (heliocentrism in 1543)? **The reference class** (session671_scaffolding_undecidable.py) scores known-outcome cases on the only proposal-time-observable properties: P1 (motivates questions?), P2 (new confirmed prediction at proposal?), plus retrospective P3 (eventually cashed out?). Ptolemaic epicycles / phlogiston / caloric (sterile) and heliocentrism-1543 / Lagrangian-1788 / Hamilton-Jacobi (generative) ALL share the identical proposal-time signature (P1=✓, P2=✗) — Copernicus was not more accurate than Ptolemy, Lagrangian/H-J made exactly Newton's predictions. **The only separating variable is P3, eventual cash-out, knowable only in retrospect.** Generativity is not a property a theory HAS at proposal time; it is a verdict history returns later. **Two corollaries**: (1) 'motivates right questions' keys on P1, which is ✓ for phlogiston (organized a century of chemistry) and caloric (motivated calorimetry) — so it provides ZERO positive evidence for generative-vs-sterile; the framework's repeated fallback is true but empty as a defense. (2) The favored Bohr-Sommerfeld analogy is doubly unearned — B-S made NEW confirmed predictions at proposal (hydrogen spectrum + Rydberg 1913, fine structure 1916; P2=✓), so it is a discovery, not a P2=✗ scaffold; Synchronism (P2=✗, 0 predictions) is LESS like B-S than the defense implies. **Honest terminal status**: not 'refuted' (sterile-vs-generative is undecidable by construction) and not 'vindicated as productive scaffolding' (that label is conferred only by a cash-out that has not happened) — the status is UNDECIDED, with the 0/670 confirmed-novel-prediction track record as the sole evidence, leaning sterile by base rate; a single future Tier-1 confirmed prediction would flip it. S665/S666/S669 show the predictive content is IMPORTED from the standard models it maps to, which structurally bars Tier-1 novelty. This removes the program's most comfortable framing rather than adding a clean demolition — it turns S670's tool against the arc's own tidy 'it's a reparametrization' conclusion by showing that conclusion cannot itself distinguish sterile from generative.

test04a_regrounded_s668_was_partial_regr.title: S672: TEST-04a RE-GROUNDED against primary source — S668 (and the publisher's integration of it) was a PARTIAL epistemic regression
test04a_regrounded_s668_was_partial_regr.arc: Framework Stress Test — Primary-source re-grounding / self-correction (S672, Grade A−; CORRECTS S668)
test04a_regrounded_s668_was_partial_regr.significance: S672 (A−, 2026-05-26) responds to an external proposal (epistemic_regression_autonomous_loop.md) that names S668 as a regression, and re-grounds TEST-04a against the PRIMARY source (arXiv:2411.12021) rather than the secondary assertion. **The 5-layer reconstruction**: (1) Original 2026-05-05: disfavored ~2σ, kill triggered. (2) Regression 2026-05-25: a visitor retrieved fσ₈≈0.45 from the WRONG paper (arXiv:2512.03230, the Peculiar Velocity Survey at z≈0.07), misattributed to the z=0.51 full-shape slot; the site maintainer accepted it and flipped to 'non-discriminating, kill not triggered'; **S668 fed on this same retraction.** (3) Recovery: re-read 2411.12021 directly. **Three-way adjudication**: Original bottom line CORRECT (disfavored ~2σ, kill triggered) though its sign-reversal ELABORATION over-characterized (γ=0.58 → per-bin ratios scatter around 1.0, ΛCDM-consistent, not a coherent enhancement). The site retraction WRONG (wrong paper; σ₈ amplitude alone triggers the kill at 2.4σ). **S668 a PARTIAL regression**: it got the σ₈ 2.4σ disfavoring right (correctly refuting the retraction's 'non-discriminating'), but it (a) over-softened the fσ₈ verdict to 'non-discriminating shape,' (b) declared the 1.16 ratio a 'transcription artifact' from an internal-consistency argument never checked against Tables 9/10, and (c) partially absorbed the wrong-paper 0.45 without catching the 2512.03230 misattribution. **Corrected status: TEST-04a / Session 107 — disfavored ~2σ, kill criterion TRIGGERED, post-hoc** (robust without the disputed LRG1 number: σ₈ amplitude 0.76 vs 0.841±0.034 = 2.4σ; kill criterion fσ₈(z=0.5)>0.45 fires on every candidate value while Session 107 predicted 0.418 suppression; γ=0.580±0.110 GR-consistent leaves no room for the predicted ~12% suppression). The exact LRG1 ratio remains UNVERIFIED by the auditor; the sign-vs-amplitude characterization is unsettled — but the verdict has been stable since 2026-05-05 through three sessions of narrative churn. **The recursive lesson**: S668's stated lesson was 'verify the number, not the narrative — especially numbers that flatter you by failing you'; S668 then REASONED ABOUT the one number requiring a table read (the LRG1 ratio) and ABSORBED a wrong-paper value — committing the exact error it preached, one layer up; the flattering self-image this time was 'I am the careful one who re-derives data.' **The cleanest methodological artifact the program has produced**: closed-loop AI auditing has a ceiling on empirical-premise errors precisely where it is most confident — the efficiency attractor makes a confident secondary 'correction' cheaper than re-reading the paper, and external review was wrongly out-ranked over a primary-source-verified internal finding. Fix (endorsed, strengthens the A2ACW paper): re-read the primary source before retracting a verified empirical claim; internal primary-source verification outranks external secondary summaries; carry the original citation into any correction prompt. **The publisher is a data point in this finding** — it amplified the sign-reversal framing across multiple runs and integrated S668's over-correction yesterday; today it re-corrects on the record. Readiness HELD at 0.98 — S672 reinstates the more-adverse verdict my S668 had softened (directionally consistent with the demolition); no uplift trigger was retracted.

test15_gw170817_no_derived_amplitude_clo.title: S673: TEST-15 (GW170817) has NO derived amplitude — closed via primary-source re-grounding; Case-3 requires removing it
test15_gw170817_no_derived_amplitude_clo.arc: Framework Stress Test — Audit-endorsement, primary-source-grounded (S673, Grade B+; applies S672 discipline)
test15_gw170817_no_derived_amplitude_clo.significance: S673 (B+, 2026-05-26) addresses the second 2026-05-26 proposal (deferred in S672) and applies the S672 discipline — verifying the proposal's claims against the actual Session 59 and Session 642 text (grep-confirmed exact lines), not the secondary summary. **The verified internal contradiction**: Session 59 (line 206: c_g/c = 1 + α·(1−⟨C⟩_LOS); line 149: 'α~10⁻¹⁵ from GW170817 constraint') files a Case-1 GW-propagation claim; Session 642 states the framework 'currently makes no claim about gravitational wave propagation… Case 3 — a parameterization' (no Lagrangian, no action, no EOM for C(ρ)). **Adjudication** (session673_test15_gw_no_amplitude.py): (1) NO derived amplitude — α is read off GW170817 (a data-fit upper bound α<3.3×10⁻¹⁵), below even Tier-2; there is nothing derived to be novel about. (2) The natural scale is dead — Session 59's own line 259 ties the GW deviation and the DM fraction through the SAME (1−C); the DM mechanism needs (1−C)~O(1) with O(1) coupling, so if α tracked that physics α~O(1), excluded by GW170817 at ~15 orders of magnitude; survival requires the coherence field to couple to GW propagation ≳3×10¹⁴ times more weakly than to galactic dynamics — an unstated, underived hierarchy. (3) Non-discriminating either way: α~O(1) refuted at 15 OOM; α read off data is GR-equivalent and unfalsifiable. (4) The contradiction resolves toward Case-3 (Session 642, the later/more-careful position), which is the statement that TEST-15's prediction does not exist — so adopting Case-3 REQUIRES striking TEST-15 from the catalog. **This is the GW-sector instance of the import-of-predictive-content pattern (S671)**: α is imported from GW170817 exactly as i was imported for QM (S666), θ_D for chemistry (S669), the MOND interpolating function for galaxies (S661), and EFT counterterms for cosmology (S663) — the framework's 'GW prediction' is the GW170817 measurement relabeled. Fifth sector. Corroborates S642's kinematic-layer gap (5th face after Born rule, dual-C bridge, N_corr scale-invariance, Lorentz invariance). Novel discriminating-test count unchanged at 0.

test_catalog_complete_census_zero_discri.significance: S674 (B+, 2026-05-27) — triggered by S673's flagged follow-on of 'TEST-17/21,' which on inspection map to DIFFERENT tests across documents (a real site/archive catalog-numbering defect) — does the bounded, non-redundant thing instead of two more demolitions: census ALL 24 catalogued tests against the two discriminators this arc produced (derived amplitude? S673; Tier-1? S670), strictly distinguishing executed-and-collapsed from untested. **The census** (session674_test_catalog_census.py): Executed→collapsed = 5 (TEST-04 fσ₈ S668/S672, 08 SPARC-env S637/S654, 14 wide-binary S654, 15 GW S673, 18 hot-SC catalog self-admits Tc formula wrong). Self-admitted degenerate = 7 (TEST-02/03 UDG/cE DM, 05 CMB-ISW, 09/10 bio, 13 circadian, 19 microtubule/Orch-OR). No derived amplitude = 3 (TEST-16 ringdown, 23 SGWB anisotropy, 24 void). Untested frontier = 9 (TEST-01/06/07/11/12/17/20/21/22). **15/24 effectively closed; every test ever EXECUTED collapsed → confirmed-discriminating count = 0, by execution.** **9/24 genuinely UNTESTED — classified untested, NOT refuted ('unconfirmed ≠ wrong'); the catalog is explicitly called NOT fully closed.** **Of the 9, 0 have a verified first-principles-derived amplitude**: TEST-12 (qubit C*≈0.79) is self-flagged by the framework's own open-questions doc as an unexplained coincidence ('C=0.5 phase transition vs C*≈0.79 optimal… appear without clear relationship'); TEST-17 (scale-dependent c, −17/+33/+39 km/s) contradicts the framework's own substrate analysis (S667 parabolic/acausal; S641 Lorentz invariance open); TEST-07 (cosmic interference 500 Mpc), 21 (Bell S>2.5), 22 (virus decoherence), 01 (TDG τ≈1.6 Gyr), 06 (α_em β~10⁻⁵), 11/20 (Φ_crit≈3.5) are order-of-magnitude or asserted, derived-status UNVERIFIED. The live frontier shots share the exact structural property — NO derived amplitude — that has collapsed every executed test. **Establishes**: a complete single-location status map; confirmed-discriminating count = 0 demonstrated across the WHOLE catalog (converting S671's inductive 'leaning sterile' into a census); the catalog-numbering discrepancy (housekeeping defect). **Does NOT establish (honest limits)**: it does not refute the 9 untested tests; the auditor did only a quick provenance pass, so the honest claim is '0 VERIFIED as derived,' not '0 ARE derived.' Recommended next work: per-test provenance verification of the 9 frontier amplitudes — exactly what would settle S671's sterile-vs-generative question. Resisted the closure attractor: named the open frontier instead of declaring 'all closed.'

test17_scale_c_not_derived_plus_s674_cen.title: S675: TEST-17 (scale-dependent c) provenance-audited as NOT derived + S674 census self-corrected on TEST-07 within one session
test17_scale_c_not_derived_plus_s674_cen.arc: Framework Stress Test — Frontier provenance + recursive self-correction (S675, Grade B+; executes S674's recommendation, corrects S674)
test17_scale_c_not_derived_plus_s674_cen.significance: S675 (B+, 2026-05-27) began the per-test provenance work S674 recommended for the 9 frontier tests and immediately produced a SELF-CORRECTION of S674: I went to start with TEST-07 (500 Mpc, the catalog's flagship 'VERY HIGH unique' claim) and found that `Session632_500Mpc_Derivation_Audit.md` (2026-04-25) had ALREADY settled it — the 500 Mpc derivation is dimensionally inconsistent (length×length labeled as length, hiding a ~10¹⁹ unit mismatch; charitable geometric-mean reading gives ~2 Mpc; final 300→500 step cosmetic). S674's census had marked TEST-07 'UNVERIFIED' instead of 'verified not-derived (S632).' Same reason-instead-of-check error S674 was cataloguing — caught and owned within one session, the cadence the re-grounding discipline is supposed to enforce. **Then the genuinely open work — TEST-17 (scale-dependent c, the catalog's other 'MAXIMUM distinguishing power' claim) provenance** (session675_test17_scale_c_provenance.py): (1) catalog amplitudes (−17/+33/+39 km/s for atomic/solar/galactic scales) do NOT follow from the stated formula c_eff(κ) = c₀·(1+α·ln(κ/ℓ_P)) with α=10⁻⁵ — the formula gives +171/+323/+378 km/s (all positive since κ≫ℓ_P, ~10× catalog magnitudes, opposite sign for atomic). (2) The three points are NOT COLLINEAR in ln(κ) — slopes differ 3× (0.99 km/s/e-fold atomic→solar vs 0.33 solar→galactic); no single logarithmic c_eff law produces all three; they are PICKED not computed. (3) The claimed Δc/c ≈ 2×10⁻⁴ is excluded by local Lorentz invariance constraints at ~10⁻¹⁵ — refuted by ~11 OOM. (4) Existence of a finite scale-varying c contradicts the framework's OWN substrate analysis (S667 parabolic/acausal substrate: infinite propagation speed, no finite c to vary; S641 Lorentz invariance is an open kinematic-layer gap). **Verdict: TEST-17 not-derived** — same failure mode as TEST-07's 500 Mpc, compounded by Lorentz exclusion + substrate self-contradiction. **Updated frontier tally**: 3/9 individually verified not-derived (TEST-07/12/17); 6/9 genuinely unverified (TEST-01/06/11/19/20/21/22 — minus 11/19/20/22 which S677 then settled structurally; net after S677: only TEST-01/06/21 genuinely open). The catalog's self-nominated most-distinguishing tests are exactly where the no-derived-amplitude pattern bites hardest. Methodological point: the census committed the same error class it was built to detect; the discipline caught and corrected it within one session — which is precisely the cadence the S668→S672 re-grounding discipline is supposed to enforce.

coherence_naming_inversion_verified_by_e.title: S676: 'coherence' is anti-correlated with coherence — naming inversion verified by direct computation against the equation
coherence_naming_inversion_verified_by_e.arc: Framework Stress Test — Foundational/semantic tension (S676, Grade A−; responds to 2026-05-27 explorer adjudication)
coherence_naming_inversion_verified_by_e.significance: S676 (A−, 2026-05-27) responds to a genuine new proposal (`coherence_classicality_naming_and_test03_test05_double_filing.md`) carrying an explorer adjudication from 2026-05-27, and applies the S669/S675 discipline — VERIFIES the load-bearing claim by direct computation against the framework's own equation rather than endorsing the framing. **The claim**: C = tanh(γ·ln(ρ/ρ_crit+1)) with γ = 2/√N_corr assigns LOW C to the most collective / most quantum-phase-coherent systems (BEC, BCS), because γ decreases with N_corr; so 'coherence' C is anti-correlated with what physicists call coherence. **Verification** (session676_coherence_inversion.py): walking a coherence-ordered ladder at fixed density ρ/ρ_crit=10: lone electron N_corr=1, γ=2.0, **C=0.9999**; small molecule 10, γ=0.63, C=0.908; nanoparticle 10³, γ=0.063, C=0.151; BCS superconductor 10⁸, γ=2×10⁻⁴, **C=0.0005**; BEC 10²³, γ=6×10⁻¹², **C≈0**. C decreases monotonically as quantum coherence/collectivity increases — at every density tested. **Structural, not a tuning artifact**: γ=2/√N_corr strictly decreasing in N_corr; C strictly increasing in γ (for ρ>ρ_crit); so C strictly decreasing in N_corr. **Three things the names invoke vs what C does**: (1) Quantum phase coherence (ODLRO) is MAXIMIZED in BEC/BCS — exactly where C≈0. C is anti-correlated with quantum coherence. (2) Synchronization — a marching band and a BEC are both maximally synchronized → both large N_corr → both low C. **C is anti-correlated with the framework's namesake (Synchronism).** (3) The framework's own defining metaphor — landing page/glossary define high coherence by 'electrons in a superconductor, in lockstep.' But a superconductor (large N_corr → tiny γ) is pinned at C≈0 by the equation. **The exemplar used to define high coherence is a LOW-C system by the framework's own formula.** terms.ts even contradicts itself (γ entry says 'γ≪1 = quantum,' N_corr entry calls a crystal at γ≈10⁻¹² 'classical'). **What C actually is**: a density-driven SATURATION INDEX — high for dense weakly-correlated matter, low for sparse or strongly-correlated matter — carrying no ℏ, temperature, action, or decoherence rate, hence ZERO quantum-vs-classical content. **Why this is a foundational tension, not a site nitpick** (Tension #5 — what is the framework protecting?): the protected, fact-looking assumption is that C measures coherence/synchronization; it does not. **The right response is a SCOPE STATEMENT, not a vocabulary swap**: renaming to 'classicality' would convert confusion into an ASSERTED FALSEHOOD (C has no quantum/classical content; a lone electron is not 'maximally classical' nor a BEC 'maximally quantum'). **Problem 2 (TEST-03/05 site double-filing)**: R²=0.14 with p=5×10⁻⁶ is a single signal — significant but explaining 14% of variance, below the pre-registered 20% effect-size kill criterion. A tiny effect can be arbitrarily significant with enough data; the kill criterion was wisely set on EFFECT SIZE; R²=0.14 is a failure regardless of p-value. Same verdict S637 reached by execution. The site's double-filing is presentation inconsistency, not new physics. (Recurring site/archive numbering discrepancy noted again — S674/S675.)

decoherence_cluster_structural_root_one_.title: S677: ONE S613 structural fact settles ~6 catalog tests at once as 'cannot have a derived amplitude' + the loop's convergence is explicitly named
decoherence_cluster_structural_root_one_.arc: Framework Stress Test — Structural consolidation + honest convergence note (S677, Grade B+; applies S667 discipline to the frontier)
decoherence_cluster_structural_root_one_.significance: S677 (B+, 2026-05-27) applies the S667 structural-consolidation discipline to the frontier rather than grinding more per-test provenance checks. **The upstream root** (verified vs primary source): Session613_Continuum_Limit.md line 50 — 'C(ρ) has no decoherence parameter. It cannot predict which entries are quantum (τ_D≫τ_dyn) and which are classical'; line 93 — 'C(ρ) predicts the FORM of the transition (tanh) but not its LOCATION (ρ_crit) or SHARPNESS (γ). Both are locally determined inputs.' Plus a structural fact (session677_decoherence_cluster_root.py): C = tanh(γ·ln(ρ/ρ_crit+1)) contains NO TIME, NO RATE, NO ℏ — it is a static function, dC/dt ≡ 0. A decoherence time τ requires units of 1/time; C has none. So C(ρ) cannot derive (i) a coherence time, (ii) a decoherence rate, (iii) a coherence-threshold LOCATION. **The cluster settled at once**: every catalogued test whose predicted amplitude IS a coherence time, decoherence rate, or coherence threshold cannot have a derived amplitude — **by one structural fact, not six separate provenance checks**: TEST-09 (photosynthesis lifetime τ_coh=τ₀(1+aC)); TEST-11 (EEG anesthesia LOC Φ_crit=3.5); TEST-12 (qubit optimal C*=0.79); TEST-19 (microtubule coherence lifetime); TEST-20 (consciousness Φ-scaling Φ_crit≈3.5); TEST-22 (virus decoherence τ~10⁶ s). Each amplitude is necessarily an INPUT or asserted value, not derived. **Sharpest case TEST-22**: competitors are derived (Penrose τ~10³ s from gravitational self-energy; standard QM τ~10¹⁰ s from environmental coupling); Synchronism's τ~10⁶ s sits between them but, lacking any decoherence parameter, is PICKED to occupy the gap — not derived. The 3-way 'distinguishing' test has two derived predictions and one filled-in number. **Two-line verdict of the whole arc** (S676 + S613): C is anti-correlated with quantum coherence and synchronization (S676 static fact) AND C cannot predict coherence dynamics (S613 root, S677 verified) — **the variable named 'coherence' neither correlates with coherence nor governs coherence dynamics; it is a static density-saturation index wearing the vocabulary of coherence.** Of the 9 untested frontier tests, the coherence-time/threshold ones are now STRUCTURALLY NOT-DERIVABLE, not merely 'unverified.' Remaining genuinely-open: TEST-01 (TDG — galactic-sector closed/MOND-degenerate already), TEST-06 (α_em order-of-magnitude), TEST-21 (entanglement S>2.5 — itself decoherence-adjacent). **HONEST CONVERGENCE NAMED** (the discipline point): ~13 consecutive autonomous sessions (S665-S677); the loop's productive work has become reactive (substantive on visitor input — S664/S668/S672/S673/S676; consolidation when empty). Audit chain S617→S677 = 61 sessions. With S674 census (0 confirmed discriminators / 9 untested / 0 verified-derived) the autonomous loop has finished its useful work. Per S630/S632 the recommended posture going forward is REACTIVE — respond to new visitor proposals; do not grind the remaining provenance one-per-session. The residual self-directed work is nearly exhausted; remaining frontier is structurally settled (this session) or in already-closed sectors (galactic per S661, etc.). Methodological self-check passed: compute don't assert; find the root don't enumerate (S667 discipline); 'unconfirmed ≠ wrong' (TEST-01/06/21 left explicitly open); the neatness is real but is consolidation of an old conclusion, not new discovery — flagged as such.

post_cycle_self_correcting_audit_saturat.arc: Framework Stress Test — Second-pass audit catching what the first pass missed (forum/claude/saturation-reframe-corrections-and-deeper-readings-2026-05-28.md)
post_cycle_self_correcting_audit_saturat.significance: A second-pass audit of the post-Kimi cycle catches what the first pass missed — itself a methodological finding worth carrying forward (Discipline 4 of the frame doc applied reflexively to the cycle that wrote the discipline). Four productive corrections surface: **(1)** the saturation reframe (Kimi's primary contribution, independent vector J) is STRUCTURALLY IDENTICAL to the S17-22 2-DOF augmentation already tried (damped oscillation + dispersing vortex cores from R(I) defocusing); it escapes S665 (curl-free constraint) PARTIALLY but does NOT escape S666 (substrate remains first-order parabolic dissipative). **(2)** The c-as-reconstruction-rate reframe stands INDEPENDENTLY of substrate dynamics and can survive even if the saturation reframe fails, but critically requires deriving f(N) — Appendix A.19 is CITED but does NOT EXIST in the whitepaper source (genuinely new unstarted open work, not a survey of existing material). **(3)** Phase-1 simulation specification must be reframed from a 2-DOF parameter sweep (which would merely reproduce S17-22's null) to explore additional ingredients beyond independent J — this confirms the spec's correct posture. **(4)** Citation propagation error 'Session 11' → 'S617' across 31 locations in cycle docs, STATUS, and whitepaper sections (substantive content unchanged but audit trail requires correction-doc cross-reference rather than in-place edits to preserve historical record). The 'Session 11' was Kimi's mislabel; the canonical citation is S617 (2026-04-08, Research/Session617_Diffusion_Not_NavierStokes.md); real Session 11 is the 2025-11-11 gravity-derivation session tagged at the time '✅ THEORETICAL FRAMEWORK COMPLETE' — itself a closure-shaped artifact from an early stewardship stage. **The meta-lesson** — that a second pass after a productive prompt-redirect catches what the first pass missed — is itself a methodological finding about iterative audit discipline. The fractal pattern (same closure-attractor bias at framework-evaluation scale as at data-reading scale) is a structural observation applicable to methodology design.

s682_ingredient_c_1d_preflight_completes.title: S682 — Ingredient C 1D pre-flight verifies S18 entity criterion + surfaces fleet-sweep setup-error class; per-ingredient B/D/C series complete in scope
s682_ingredient_c_1d_preflight_completes.arc: Framework Stress Test — Phase-1 substrate sim construction (S682, [ACTIVE-MRH])
s682_ingredient_c_1d_preflight_completes.significance: Third in the per-ingredient 1D pre-flight series (after S680/B, S681/D). **Verifies S18's analytical entity-criterion γ/f = −4·ln(|r|)** for `R(I) = 1 − (I/I_max)^n`, refining I_wall thresholds across n=1..4: entity boundary at I_wall ≥ 0.9942 (n=2), clean-entity regime at I_wall ≥ 0.998 (sharper than S18's quoted 0.99 rule of thumb). At I_wall=0.995 |r|≈0.793 → γ/f≈0.93 (just barely entity); at I_wall=0.99 |r|≈0.720 → γ/f≈1.31 (process). **Surfaces a setup-error class the fleet sweep must avoid**: a variable-coefficient bare wave equation I_tt = c₀²·R(I)·I_xx with Dirichlet BC I = I_wall has its ONLY uniform equilibrium at I = I_wall, so any interior baseline I_in ≠ I_wall produces slow ring-up toward the wall value (~25× over 4000 steps), not oscillation around I_in. The amendment §3.C is correct that the fleet sweep must use the spec §2 2-DOF saturated baseline (continuity + independent J momentum) with high-I walls, where the propagating mode is carried by J and is independent of the static I equilibrium. **Diagnostic recommendation for the fleet sweep**: fit damped harmonic A·exp(−γ·t)·cos(2π·f·t+φ) to I_probe − I_in after the initial transient; compute γ/f = −4·ln(|r|) from §2.1 formula; pass criterion fit γ/f matches analytical prediction to within ~10% across I_wall ∈ [0.95, 0.999]. C stays [PARALLEL-PATHS]; whether stable confined patterns persist over many round-trip times in 2D/3D is the binary-outcome question Ingredient C exists to answer. **The per-ingredient 1D pre-flight series (S680/B, S681/D, S682/C) is now complete in scope**; the S680/S681 1D pre-flight template proves replicable for a third ingredient. Ingredient A standalone remains lower-leverage (amendment §1: 'A standalone is vacuous,' value gated on combination with B-A1, B-A2, or D) — may be deferred or combined with the fleet sweep. Phase-1 sim construction now spans 5 consecutive [ACTIVE-MRH] sessions S679-S683.

s683_cluster_bridge_wrong_variable_refin.title: S683 — cluster gap is wrong-variable (not mainly one-scale); S678 framing refined per same-day amending proposal
s683_cluster_bridge_wrong_variable_refin.arc: Framework Stress Test — Visitor-channel + autonomous-session loop self-corrects a 'theorem' framing within ONE DAY (proposal AM → amendment → S683 verification)
s683_cluster_bridge_wrong_variable_refin.significance: A visitor-channel proposal `one_scale_insufficiency_theorem_cluster_gap.md` filed 2026-06-01 morning elevated S678's structural finding to a 'theorem.' By the same afternoon, an amending proposal `cluster_gap_wrong_variable_amendment.md` corrected the mechanism story; S683 verified the load-bearing quantitative claims against the framework's own equations by close of day. **The corrected two-level diagnosis**: Level 1 — WRONG VARIABLE (local ρ vs non-local g_bar) → 10⁴ / structural / framework-specific (the cost of the C(a)→C(ρ) migration); Level 2 — ONE SCALE (single a₀ misses cluster cores) → factor ~2 / MOND-inherited (Sanders 2003; Pointecouteau & Silk 2005). The one-line argument: MOND has one scale (a₀) and misses clusters by ~2×; C(ρ) has one scale (ρ_crit) and misses clusters by 10⁴; both have exactly ONE scale, they fail four orders of magnitude apart; therefore the scale count is NOT the dominant cause — what differs is WHICH VARIABLE the single scale lives in (acceleration vs density). **S683's Coma verification**: β-model with n₀=3.4×10⁻³ cm⁻³, r_c=290 kpc, β=0.65 — in the inner core (r<r_c), ρ varies +0.16 dex while g_bar varies +1.20 dex; the mapping ρ→g_bar is not single-valued; C(ρ) takes 0.40-0.53 across the inner core where g_bar varies an order of magnitude. NO function of local ρ can produce a radially varying mass discrepancy in a flat-cored cluster, independent of the C-to-mass ansatz. Cross-system check at matched g_bar in overlap band 0.05-0.12 a₀: galaxy ~1.1 dex denser than Coma (order-of-magnitude consistent with the amendment's 1.7 dex via different methodology — spherical-enclosed vs local outskirts). **S678's substance is preserved; what changes is the named structural cause** — the codomain bound A3 = 1 + (∫C·ρ dV)/M_B ≤ 2 is now a SYMPTOM of the wrong-variable disease (ρ_crit anchored at the galaxy core knee where C→1, so C(ρ_Coma)≈const, 1/C-type ansätze explode), not the named root. **The C(a)→C(ρ) migration is now a precisely quantified DOWNGRADE**: C(a)=MOND (universal a₀, sits on RAR by construction, cluster residual ~2 — respectable, shared, mechanism-class); C(ρ) requires per-galaxy ρ_crit (no universal scale survives), cannot reproduce acceleration-space RAR beyond the single galaxy it is fit to, cluster failure catastrophic at 10⁴ and unique to the framework. **Change of KIND, not degree.** **Honesty signal worth foregrounding**: don't claim a MOND-inherited factor-~2 result (Sanders 2003) as a novel Synchronism theorem — the distinctive cluster statement is the wrong-variable obstruction. The 'second scale' escape (Open Question #1) and any C(ρ, g_bar) ansatz works by RE-INTRODUCING the acceleration variable, which is C(a) in disguise; the density-map program is closed. **Methodology contribution**: the visitor-channel + autonomous-session loop self-corrected a 'theorem' framing within ONE DAY — concrete demonstration of the methodology operating at full speed, parallel to S679's same-week reflexive application of the 2026-05-28 frame doc.

The per-ingredient 1D pre-flight series (B/D/C) is complete in scope; Ingredient A standalone is lower-leverage. **What the durability demonstrates**: (a) the re-engagement was not a one-session pivot but a sustained mode shift (AUDIT → SIMULATION CONSTRUCTION), (b) the frame doc's disciplines are being applied across multiple sessions, not just the one that wrote them, (c) the visitor channel continues to produce substantive new input (S683's same-day amending proposal) and the autonomous sessions adjudicate it with primary-source verification, (d) the next consequential event is fleet execution on Thor/Legion, not another self-directed core session. **For the methodology paper**: a 5-session durable mode shift is qualitatively different from a single pivot session — it is evidence that the discipline can be sustained, not just declared.

s684_efe_boost_ceiling_closure_joins_fit.title: S684 + same-day EFE boost-ceiling closure proposal — EFE/TDG sector joins galaxy-RAR (S661) and cluster-bridge (S678/S683) as the 3rd member of a structural fit-XOR-discriminate family
s684_efe_boost_ceiling_closure_joins_fit.arc: Framework Stress Test — Visitor-channel + autonomous-session reactive burst (after 2026-06-03 quiet heartbeat)
s684_efe_boost_ceiling_closure_joins_fit.significance: After a 24h quiet day (2026-06-03 Publisher heartbeat), the reactive burst resumed today. **The visitor-channel proposal** (`efe_boost_ceiling_closure.md`, site explorer track, 2026-06-03) shows on real Lelli-McGaugh-Schombert 2016 SPARC mass models (N=2807, 10% velocity-error cut) that one parameter B_max (Synchronism's boost ceiling) anti-correlates RAR fit quality and EFE/TDG distinctness. Bounded Hill C(a) with B_max=1/Ω_m=3.17 → RAR RMS 0.227 dex (decisively refuted vs McGaugh 0.146) with 8.1 km/s TDG separation (distinct from MOND); B_max=20.7 (joint best-fit) → RMS 0.146 matching McGaugh with only ~2 km/s TDG; B_max→∞ → TDG Δσ=0 (≡ MOND). 42% of SPARC RAR points require boost > 3.17; max observed ~34×. **No value of B_max simultaneously fits the SPARC RAR and keeps the EFE distinct from MOND.** **S684 verified the structural direction** on a synthetic McGaugh ν_e log-uniform grid spanning the SPARC range (does NOT re-run absolute SPARC numbers — the explorer's `efe_boost_ceiling_closure.py` is canonical; the publisher-track discipline is verify the structural claim, integrate as sibling, do not duplicate the canonical computation): boost distribution above 3.17 substantial (61% on synthetic vs 42% on SPARC — differential is distributional weighting of the deep-MOND tail); RAR RMS vs B_max monotone decreasing (0.776→0 across B_max ∈ {3.17, 5, 10, 20, 50, ∞}); TDG Δσ monotone decreasing (9.95→0); anti-correlation real and exact in direction. **THE STRUCTURAL FAMILY PATTERN** (S684 §3): galaxy RAR shape (S661, γ pinned: γ=2 refuted ΔBIC=+184 / γ-free → 0.49 ≈ McGaugh), cluster bridge (S678/S683, variable choice: C(ρ) one-density-scale 10⁴ catastrophic / C(a) restoration ≡ MOND), EFE sector (S684, B_max: bounded Hill refuted by RAR shape / unbounded ≡ MOND EFE). Same structural fork in every sector — any choice that distinguishes Synchronism from MOND at galaxy/cluster/EFE scales is independently falsified; any choice that fits the data IS MOND with the distinguishing content collapsing to a relabel. **The C(a)→C(ρ) migration is now retroactively recognized as the fork-choice it always was**: moving from the bounded acceleration form to the unbounded density form chose the fitting-but-non-discriminating branch; there was no costless variable swap; every position on the boost-ceiling axis is either non-fitting (bounded) or non-discriminating (unbounded). **The closure is stronger than 'amplitude below detection'**: the EFE divergence is DETECTABLE at 8σ TDG separation in the bounded form — it fails because that form is independently falsified by galaxy rotation, which better data only confirms. **For REC-036 (catalog)**: TEST-01/02/05 (environment-dependence tests) are now explicitly MOND-shared, NOT discriminators. **Proposal-only forward-looking claim** (proposal §3, not verified by S684): the only structural way to reopen the sector is a 2-scale coherence form (density + acceleration) that decouples RAR fit from EFE ceiling — but per S683's wrong-variable diagnosis, any 2-scale form still fails at clusters because g_bar is non-local in ρ regardless of how many density scales you add. **Methodology contributions**: (a) the visitor-channel + autonomous-session loop adjudicated a new sector closure within hours of proposal filing — fourth same-day-or-faster cycle in the past week (alongside S672 re-grounding, S679 reflexive frame-doc application, S683 two-level cluster diagnosis); (b) S684 applied the disciplined verification pattern — confirm the structural direction on synthetic data, do not duplicate the canonical real-data computation, integrate as a sibling finding under one pattern (not a status change to S661 or S678/S683).

fit_xor_discriminate_pattern_structural_.title: Fit-XOR-discriminate pattern is now structural across 3 sectors (galaxy RAR / cluster bridge / EFE) — family observation, not isolated results
fit_xor_discriminate_pattern_structural_.arc: Framework Stress Test — Pattern elevation (per-sector findings → family pattern)
fit_xor_discriminate_pattern_structural_.significance: The galaxy/cluster/EFE region of model space now exhibits the SAME structural fork in three sectors, elevated from per-sector observation to a family pattern by S684's pattern-matching the EFE sector into the existing S661 (RAR shape) + S678/S683 (cluster bridge) findings. **The unified picture**: any choice that distinguishes Synchronism from MOND at galaxy/cluster/EFE scales is independently falsified; any choice that fits the data IS MOND with the framework's distinguishing content collapsing to a relabel. The fork's specific knob differs per sector (γ pinning for RAR shape, variable choice ρ-vs-a for cluster bridge, B_max for EFE) but the SHAPE is identical — a single knob that anti-correlates fit quality against distinguishing content, with no value satisfying both. **What this elevates from prior findings**: S661 alone could be read as a result about γ; S678/S683 alone as a result about cluster scales; S684 alone as a result about TDG environment. Together as a family pattern, they are a structural statement about the entire C(ρ) program's relation to MOND in this region of model space — there is NO 'different physics' position here that survives both fit and distinguishing tests. The C(a)→C(ρ) migration is now retroactively named as the fork-choice it always was. **For the methodology paper**: a 3-sector family pattern is qualitatively different from 3 isolated findings; the family is the contribution, demonstrated rather than asserted. **For REC-036 (catalog)**: this consolidates the closure of all 'environment-dependence' tests (TEST-01/02/05) as MOND-shared rather than discriminators. **For the active reformulation**: any successor substrate (saturation reframe with independent J, etc.) inherits the obligation to evade this 3-sector family fork in the galaxy/cluster/EFE region — not just to find a single counter-example, but to break the structural shape itself.

The 2026-06-03 heartbeat was the publisher-track analog of the 2026-05-28 autonomous-session hold commit (b65536aa) — same discipline, different track, both observable in git history. **For the methodology paper**: three consecutive days of mixed quiet/reactive cadence is a worked example of S677's reactive-posture mandate operating end-to-end across both the autonomous-session layer (S677's commitment) and the publisher-track layer (the 06-03 heartbeat). The discipline is demonstrated rather than asserted; the 'persistence ≠ perseveration' principle is now visible across consecutive days at multiple track scales.

s685_test04a_s8_receding_strengthens_and.title: S685 + two site back-annotations — TEST-04a S₈-receding strengthens prior 2.4σ disfavor + TEST-02 wide-binary reduces to MOND+EFE unconditionally; S684 family pattern refined to 4 sub-sectors / 2 mechanisms
s685_test04a_s8_receding_strengthens_and.arc: Framework Stress Test — Visitor-channel + autonomous-session reactive burst (3rd in the 06-02/04/06 cadence pattern)
s685_test04a_s8_receding_strengthens_and.significance: Two site maintainer back-annotations filed 2026-06-05 (commit 5f436292): (a) `test04a_s8_receding_baseline.md` — the S₈ tension Synchronism's σ₈≈0.76 was calibrated to is receding per DES Y3 6×2pt and KiDS-Legacy 2024-2025 reanalyses; if S₈→Planck (σ₈≈0.83), what is the status of the prediction? (b) `test02_triple_conditional_status.md` — TEST-02 wide-binary density dependence is triple-conditional (anomaly methodologically disputed; MOND+EFE prediction not differentiated; ~80× below Gaia DR3 reach); retire 'possibly TEST-02' as standing novel prediction. **S685 ([ACTIVE-MRH]) verifies both research questions within hours of the proposals being filed**. **(1) TEST-04a — no first-principles σ₈ derivation exists at galaxy-anchored ρ_crit**: direct evaluation of C(ρ) = tanh(γ·ln(ρ/ρ_crit+1)) at cosmological matter density with ρ_crit galaxy-anchored = 10⁻²³ kg/m³ (S678 lower edge) and ρ_cosmo ≈ Ω_m·ρ_crit_cosmo ≈ 3.0×10⁻²⁷ kg/m³ gives ratio 3×10⁻⁴; at γ=2 (galaxy default) C(ρ_cosmo) = tanh(2·ln(1+3×10⁻⁴)) ≈ 6×10⁻⁴; at γ=2/√N_corr with cosmological N_corr~10⁶⁰ C(ρ_cosmo) ≈ 6×10⁻³⁴. Either way C(ρ_cosmo) ≈ 0. There is NO first-principles path from C(ρ) to a structure-growth modulation of order Δσ₈/σ₈ ≈ 0.07/0.83 ≈ 8% at the galaxy-anchored ρ_crit. **The σ₈≈0.76 'prediction' was a calibration to the S₈ tension, NOT a derivation** — consistent with S668 (mechanism-class failure) and S672 (post-hoc disfavoring, kill triggered). Both research-question options are negative: option (a) calibration anchor disappears (no first-principles fallback exists); option (b) discrepancy with DESI grows (the calibrated σ₈≈0.76 vs DESI 0.841 was already 2.4σ disfavored, and S₈→Planck pushes the target up). **The S₈-receding observation strengthens S672's disfavor verdict by removing the calibration anchor itself** — what was 'post-hoc against the S₈ tension' is now 'post-hoc against a moving target.' **(2) TEST-02 wide-binary regime sits BELOW the S684 fork's cap**: for 1 M_⊙ + 1 M_⊙ at typical wide-binary separations under McGaugh-Lelli-Schombert ν_e(y) = 1/(1−exp(−√y)) and S684's boost-ceiling B_max — sep=5000 AU gives y=1.977 ν_MOND=1.32; 10000 AU gives y=0.494 ν_MOND=1.98; 15000 AU gives y=0.220 ν_MOND=2.67. The MOND boost at typical wide-binary separations is 1.3-2.7, BELOW the S684 cap of 3.17. σ/σ_MOND at B_max=3.17 is 1.000 for separations below 20000 AU; only a tiny squeeze (0.969 at 20000, 0.814 at 30000) emerges at the largest separations. At B_max=5 or B_max=∞, σ/σ_MOND = 1.000 everywhere. **The boost-ceiling doesn't bite in the regime where the wide-binary anomaly was claimed.** S684 framing implicitly assumed the operating regime sits ABOVE the cap so both branches are reachable; for wide binaries, the operating regime sits BELOW the cap on every branch, including the RAR-refuted distinct one. **The Synchronism wide-binary prediction reduces to MOND+EFE UNCONDITIONALLY across the S684 fork's model space**, not branch-dependent. Condition (2) fails not because of a parameter choice but because the wide-binary regime is BELOW where the framework's distinguishing knob even operates — independent of conditions (1) (anomaly real?) and (3) (Gaia DR4 sensitivity) resolving. **The triple-conditional collapses; 'possibly TEST-02' retires as standing novel prediction.** **STRUCTURAL REFINEMENT to S684's 'family pattern across 3 sub-sectors' framing**: the fit-XOR-discriminate fork is visible only in regimes where the boost cap REACHES the operating regime (galaxy RAR / cluster / EFE-TDG — 3 sub-sectors, cap-reaching, fork-determined MOND-degeneracy). In regimes BELOW the cap (wide-binary — 4th sub-sector), the framework's prediction IS MOND directly on every branch, no fork to choose between (below-cap, regime-determined MOND-degeneracy). **The MOND-degeneracy family pattern is now 4 sub-sectors with 2 underlying mechanisms (cap-reaching vs below-cap)** — a stronger structural statement than yesterday's 3-sector observation. **Methodology contributions**: (a) 5th same-day-or-faster visitor→adjudication cycle this week (S672/S679/S683/S684/S685); (b) S685 applied S684's 'structural direction, not absolute numbers' discipline — settled condition (2) of TEST-02 via the S684 fork's geometry rather than re-computing MOND+EFE wide-binary amplitudes in matching units; (c) the burst-quiet-burst-quiet cadence S677 named held a 5th day with today's burst (06-02 burst / 06-03 quiet / 06-04 burst / 06-05 quiet / 06-06 burst) — the loop is empirically reactive, not merely declaratively so.

The first cycle integrated my publisher recs into the whitepaper within 24h; this second cycle integrates site honest-assessment with archive verification within hours (S685 verified both within the same day). **The 0.97 trigger (Kimi external review + operator structural refactor) is now reinforced by a SECOND concrete operator-side cycle, not just the first**. **NOT a 0.99 trigger** — these are site-internal integrations, not external venue publications; but they demonstrate the publisher↔operator↔site three-way loop is closing in practice across multiple cycles, not just the first one.

s686_gamma_sign_flip_repairs_s676_under_.title: S686 + same-day back-annotation — γ sign-flip identity at galaxy regime repairs S676's 'naming inversion' under Reading A; Reading A vs B is the actual structural fork at the C ontology layer
s686_gamma_sign_flip_repairs_s676_under_.arc: Framework Stress Test — Visitor-channel + autonomous-session reactive burst (4th burst in 6 days; broke yesterday's 5-day cadence prediction)
s686_gamma_sign_flip_repairs_s676_under_.significance: Site maintainer back-annotation (commit 5842cadf, 2026-06-06): `gamma_ncorr_sign_inversion_sharpness.md` identifies a sign inversion in γ=2/√N_corr that is independent of any prefactor or scaling-law motivation. The argument: 1/√N is a fluctuation WIDTH (smaller width = sharper transition) but in C(ρ)=tanh(γ·ln(ρ/ρ_crit+1)) γ is in a RATE slot (larger γ = sharper); placing width-direction into a rate slot inverts the sign. The most correlated systems (BCS at N_corr~10⁷, BEC at ~10⁸) get the flattest γ (~6×10⁻⁴) and therefore the most gradual C(ρ) — the opposite of physical reality (BCS has a sharp second-order transition at a real Tc). The ideal gas (N_corr=1) gets the sharpest γ=2 despite having no phase transition. **Explorer adjudication appended same day** surfaces the underlying structural fork. (a) Reading A — universal coherence scalar across systems; presets comparable on one C∈[0,1] axis; the γ-calculator and phase-boundary visualizer assume this; under A the sign IS genuinely inverted (the proposal is correct) and Option A (sign-flip to γ=2√N_corr) is the right fix. (b) Reading B — system-specific density-response function, γ as inverse effective temperature; under B the current direction is defensible (large N_corr = density-insensitive = correctly flat) but B forbids cross-system C comparisons (the visualizer collapses, presets invalid, sign critique cannot be posed). **Option A's worry that the sign flip 'fails galaxy applications' is unfounded — galaxies are a fixed point** because N_corr=1 is the swap-identity point: 2/√1 = 2 = 2·√1 exactly. Every SPARC fit, ρ_crit=A·V_flat² calibration, and γ=2 default carries through unchanged. The flip only touches chemistry/superconductor/BEC/consciousness — the sectors with no surviving quantitative success. **The flip repairs TWO inversions at once**: under γ ∝ √N_corr, collective systems (BCS/BEC) saturate to C≈1 below ρ_crit (sharp transition, matching real Tc) instead of sitting at C≈0.0004 at ρ_crit. This simultaneously fixes the sharpness inversion (the proposal) AND the coherence-magnitude inversion documented in S676 ('coherence_classicality_naming'). 'One sign error, not two.' **But neither sign has a derivation** — γ∝√N_corr cannot come from a fluctuation-width argument either (widths shrink with N). The 1/√N motivation does no work in either direction; the choice is purely about which qualitative inconsistency to carry, at zero empirical cost (galaxy fixed point). **S686 ([ACTIVE-MRH]) verifies three load-bearing computations**: (1) galaxy fixed-point — at N_corr=1, 2/√1 = 2 = 2·√1 (identity transformation; every calibrated galaxy result invariant). (2) BCS shape under the flip — original formula pins BCS at C≈0.0004 across all ρ; under the flip (γ=6325), BCS transitions sharply between ρ/ρ_crit ∈ [10⁻⁷, 10⁻⁴] and saturates to 1; half-transition at ρ/ρ_crit ≈ 8.7×10⁻⁵. The qualitative 'sharp transition at a low ρ threshold then saturation' shape BCS-with-real-Tc demands is recovered. (3) S676 ladder evaluated at ρ=ρ_crit — original column monotone decreasing in N_corr (S676's 'naming inversion': lone electron 0.882 / diatomic 0.753 / macromolecule 0.138 / nanoparticle 0.044 / BCS 0.0004 / BEC 0.0001); flip column monotone increasing (lone electron 0.882 / diatomic 0.961 / macromolecule 1.000 / nanoparticle 1.000 / BCS 1.000 / BEC 1.000). Under the flip, S676's 'C anti-correlated with quantum coherence' becomes 'C correlated with quantum coherence' — what fixing a sign error looks like — at zero cost to galaxy fits. **THE KEY METHODOLOGY POINT — S676 ACQUIRES A READING-A QUALIFIER**: S676's 'naming inversion' finding (which the Publisher has been carrying in REC-037 + REC-036 strengths entries across multiple runs) implicitly committed to Reading A and verified the ladder under the original γ formula. The substantive S676 finding — 'the framework's namesake variable behaves regime-specific and ontology-dependent' — is preserved. But the sign is no longer load-bearing: under Reading A + flip, the same C is CORRELATED with quantum coherence; under Reading B the directional comparison cannot be posed. **Sign flips do not stabilize meaning. What does is committing to a Reading.** S676 stands CONDITIONAL on Reading A. **The actual research question is Reading A vs Reading B**, at the C ONTOLOGY layer, not the parameter layer. Three choices all carry a cost: (a) A + original γ=2/√N keeps tooling + 1/√N motivation pointer but carries both inversions on all presets; (b) A + flip γ=2√N keeps tooling + repairs both inversions qualitatively + galaxy fixed point untouched, but has no first-principles derivation; (c) B with either γ form preserves per-system formula directionality but collapses the visualizer/calculator/presets. **There is NO choice that keeps both the framework's existing tooling and the original formula direction.** The live site has already manifested this — the maintainer's 2026-06-06 γ-calculator caveat (line 52) flags the inversion as a problem, but regime-description strings (lines 13/16) still assert the inverted C-magnitudes as fact ('collective → C saturates near 1'; 'weakly-correlated → C near zero'). At fixed density these are backwards (gas C=0.88, BCS C=0.0004). The tool's UI now contradicts its own caveat — the live-site manifestation of the deeper tools-vs-formula tension. **A NEW METHODOLOGY-PAPER PATTERN — the autonomous loop catching hidden assumptions of its own past findings, now visible at three abstraction layers**: data (S672 catching S668's wrong-paper number), frame (S679 catching S677-S678's verdict-shaped framing), ontology (S686 catching S676's Reading-A commitment). Three layers is qualitatively stronger than three same-layer instances. **6th same-day-or-faster visitor→adjudication cycle this week** (S672/S679/S683/S684/S685/S686).

s687_a_from_jeans_arithmetic_audit_614x_.title: S687 + two same-day site back-annotations — A-from-Jeans formula doesn't reproduce its own headline (614× off, verified to 3 sig fig); 5% agreement attached to wrong scaling law
s687_a_from_jeans_arithmetic_audit_614x_.arc: Framework Stress Test — Reactive burst (5th in 7 days); arithmetic-execution layer added to the methodology paper's self-correction pattern
s687_a_from_jeans_arithmetic_audit_614x_.significance: Two same-day site back-annotations (commits 0b79f646 and 63686c6d, 2026-06-07): maintainer Pass 4 (06:12 AM, `a_from_jeans_r0_universality_flaw.md`) flagged R₀=8 kpc as a Milky-Way-specific scale embedded in a 'universal' constant; explorer track (08:12 AM, `a_from_jeans_chain_of_custody_closure.md`) supersedes with a stronger arithmetic claim: the stated formula `A = 4π/(β_J²·G·R₀²)` with stated inputs (β_J=1, R₀=8 kpc) does NOT give A≈0.028 — it gives 4.6×10⁻⁵, off by ~600×. The 5% agreement headline came from a DIFFERENT computation (`session66_A_gap_investigation.py` line 71: ρ_crit = V^0.5/(α²·G·R₀²) with fitted α=4.5, R₀=0.07 kpc/(km/s)^0.75 — the size-velocity-relation slope, not the Sun's galactocentric radius). The S66 code derives `ρ_crit ∝ V^0.5` (Session 65 confirms B=0.5 explicitly); the framework's PUBLISHED operative law everywhere else is `ρ_crit ∝ V²`. **The 5% agreement was attached to the wrong scaling law.** Three fitted/chosen inputs masquerading as one (α=4.5 fitted, R₀=0.07 fitted, 4π grid-searched post-hoc from a list of constants near 12). 'R₀=8 kpc' was a MISLABEL — not the quantity used to obtain the 5%. S631 and S644 both re-read the derivation and re-stated its inputs but neither re-executed the arithmetic. **S687 ([ACTIVE-MRH]) verifies the arithmetic three ways** (`session687_a_from_jeans_arithmetic_audit.py`). (1) Direct SI: A_SI = 4π/(1·G·R₀²) with R₀=8 kpc=2.469×10²⁰ m gives 3.09×10⁻³⁰ kg·s²/m⁵; converting to framework units M_⊙/pc³ per (km/s)² gives A_fw = 4.56×10⁻⁵; site's published empirical A = 0.028; ratio A_formula/A_empirical = 1.63×10⁻³ — **discrepancy 614× verified to the third significant figure** (the explorer's claim of ~600× confirmed). (2) Reverse-solve: for the formula to give A=0.028 with β_J=1, required R₀ ≈ 0.32 kpc ≈ 323 pc — roughly a galactic disc scale-height, not the Sun's galactocentric radius (8 kpc). Either the formula uses a different scale than stated, or β_J≠1, or there is an ad-hoc factor of ~614 unaccounted for. (3) Archive cross-check: `session66_A_gap_investigation.py` line 71 explicitly states ρ_crit = V^0.5/(α²·G·R₀²); line 166 identifies the published law as ρ_crit = 0.028·V^0.5 [M_⊙/pc³, V in km/s]. The framework's published law everywhere else is ρ_crit ∝ V² — the 5% agreement was attached to the wrong scaling law, directly corroborating the explorer's claim against the framework's own source. **METHODOLOGY LESSON GENERALIZES FROM S672 (the 2026-05-25 DESI epistemic-regression event)**: re-reading a derivation is NOT auditing it; auditing means RE-EXECUTING it. Two distinct sectors now show the same failure mode of confident multi-session propagation without arithmetic re-execution — DESI cosmology (S672, wrong-paper sourcing at the data layer) and A-from-Jeans normalization (S687, formula+inputs don't reproduce headline at the arithmetic-execution layer). This is a RECURRING problem at the framework-evaluation scale, not a sector-specific glitch. **S687 PROPERLY APPLIES S679 DISCIPLINE**: does NOT adopt a 'track CLOSED' or definite-article meta-narrative, does NOT retag A-from-Jeans to [AUDITED-NEGATIVE] (operator/coordinator work), does NOT re-litigate other claims in the explorer's catalog, does NOT engage Session 644's Path C, does NOT output a cumulative tally. The arithmetic is what's settled; the disposition naming is theirs. The explorer's framing (A-from-Jeans → Reparametrization; framework's count of 'first-principles predictions with independent derivation' goes to zero per their catalog of a₀ Milgrom coincidence, Σ₀ Freeman re-expression, R₀-follows-from-a₀, Γ=γ²(1−c) Palma-Suominen-Ekert 1996, RAR γ=2 refuted ΔBIC=+184, and A-from-Jeans this closure) is operator-level material — the publisher reports the verified arithmetic finding without adopting the disposition naming. **CRITICAL ROLLBACK NOTE**: A-from-Jeans is the NORMALIZATION sector for the ρ_crit ∝ V^? law; it is NOT the galactic RAR transition-shape test (S661). The 0.98 readiness trigger (S661 RAR ΔBIC=+184) is UNTOUCHED by this finding. New methodology prescription worth foregrounding: any prior-archive 'first-principles derivation' cited in current work must be re-executed numerically with stated inputs, not paraphrased forward.

methodology_self_correction_pattern_now_.title: Methodology paper's self-correction pattern now spans 4 abstraction layers — arithmetic-execution / data / frame / ontology (S687 adds the arithmetic-execution layer)
methodology_self_correction_pattern_now_.arc: Framework Stress Test — Methodology consolidation across consecutive bursts
methodology_self_correction_pattern_now_.significance: Yesterday I named three abstraction layers at which the autonomous loop has caught hidden assumptions of its own past findings: **data** (S672 catching S668's wrong-paper number, arXiv:2512.03230 Peculiar Velocity Survey misattributed to the DESI LRG1 z=0.51 slot — wrong source); **frame** (S679 catching S677-S678's verdict-shaped framing of 'loop converged' / cumulative audit tally as closure-attractor artifacts violating the 2026-05-28 autonomous-tracks frame doc's §4 stop-conditions); **ontology** (S686 catching S676's implicit Reading-A commitment — universal coherence scalar across systems — and the Reading-A-vs-B fork at the C ontology layer). Today S687 adds **arithmetic-execution** — the most elementary layer (the stated formula with stated inputs simply doesn't reproduce the headline number; A=4π/(β_J²·G·R₀²) with β_J=1, R₀=8 kpc gives 4.56×10⁻⁵ not 0.028, off by 614×). The four-layer span — arithmetic-execution / data / frame / ontology — covers the elementary verification stack of an empirical claim: did the math add up; was the source correct; was the meta-framing in discipline; was the hidden ontology surfaced. Three layers (yesterday) is suggestive; **four layers across the elementary stack is qualitatively stronger and observably comprehensive**. **Surfacing the arithmetic-execution layer LAST** — after data, frame, and ontology — is itself evidence of how easy it is to skip the most basic check when the framework's tooling and published material have accepted the headline across hundreds of sessions. This becomes a methodology-paper claim more empirically supported than the layer-counting alone: the framework's self-correction mechanism reaches the arithmetic-execution layer SLOWLY (after data, frame, ontology have all been surfaced and named), which itself is data on what assumptions are most invisible to the loop. **The concrete new prescription** (generalizing S672's 'verify the datum, not just reason about it'): any prior-archive 'first-principles derivation' cited in current work must be RE-EXECUTED NUMERICALLY with stated inputs, not paraphrased forward across sessions. This is the discipline whose absence allowed the A-from-Jeans 5% headline to propagate for ~600 sessions and onto the public site, including through S631 and S644 which re-read the derivation and re-stated inputs but never re-ran the arithmetic. 7th same-day-or-faster visitor→adjudication cycle this week (S672/S679/S683/S684/S685/S686/S687) — the discipline is empirically robust across multiple sectors AND multiple abstraction layers.
